app_tagline: A calm tool for keeping a record of housing problems where you live. It runs on your own device.
meta_description: A private tool tenants can use to record housing problems and keep the proof on their own device.
alpha_warning: Alpha software — do not rely on this for real legal matters yet.
status_awaiting_help: Your photo is already sealed and safe on this device. The timestamp just proves when — it will attach automatically next time you're online. A wait, even a long one, does not weaken the evidence.
status_timestamped_help: Sealed and timestamped — nothing more to do.
storage_doubling_note: Sealed originals are kept twice by design: the encrypted original, plus a shareable copy when you export.
resolve_help: Fetch trusted timestamps for items captured offline (needs a connection).
msg_resolved: {count, plural, =0 {No timestamps were awaiting.} one {# awaiting timestamp resolved.} other {# awaiting timestamps resolved.}}
issues_empty_next: No issues yet — start by adding one below in 'Add an issue'.
issue_timeline_count: {count, plural, one {# timeline entry} other {# timeline entries}}
issue_none_available: No issues yet — add one in 'Add an issue' first
strength_detail: {strong} strong, {developing} developing, {minimal} minimal · {timeline, plural, one {# linked timeline entry} other {# linked timeline entries}}
strength_caveat: Record strength reflects what's in this record — timestamps, custody, corroborating timeline — not a legal judgment, and not admissibility.
field_dev_tsa_help: For trying out the app without internet. A practice timestamp is not trusted and does not prove the time to a court. Leave it off for real evidence.
capture_awaiting_reassure: Your photo is already saved and protected by its content hash. It will receive a trusted timestamp the next time you are online — choose “Resolve awaiting timestamps” above. Nothing is lost in the meantime.
field_include_originals_help: The originals are your full-quality photos, kept locked in your vault. They can still hold location and other hidden details, so include them only when the recipient needs them.
footer_note: habitable runs entirely on this device. Nothing leaves your computer.
msg_recur_added: Recurrence recorded; the issue was reopened.
msg_export_done_warn: Packet exported, but verification did not pass.
msg_export_done_awaiting: {count, plural, one {Packet exported. # item is still awaiting a trusted timestamp, so the packet does not verify as complete yet.} other {Packet exported. # items are still awaiting a trusted timestamp, so the packet does not verify as complete yet.}}
export_awaiting_next: The content hash already anchors each awaiting item at capture. Next step: use 'Resolve awaiting timestamps' when you have a connection, then export again.
error_fallback: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error_file_read: Could not read the selected file.
error_lang_load: Could not load that language. Keeping the current one.
